Templates load into an injectable *templates.Set; declared helpers land
in the generated FuncMap, package-qualified wherever they live.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates => TEMPLATEDIR
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/templates.go --
package web

import (
	"embed"
	"strings"
	"time"
)

//fabrik:templates
//go:embed all:templates
var Templates embed.FS

//fabrik:templates:func
func HumanizeAge(t time.Time) string { return t.String() }

//fabrik:templates:func name=upper
func UpperCase(s string) string { return strings.ToUpper(s) }
-- shared/helpers.go --
package shared

//fabrik:templates:func
func Reverse(s string) string {
	b := []byte(s)
	for i, j := 0, len(b)-1; i < j; i, j = i+1, j-1 {
		b[i], b[j] = b[j], b[i]
	}
	return string(b)
}
-- web/templates/_default/_layout.html --
<html><body>{{ block "content" . }}{{ end }}</body></html>
-- web/templates/_default/home.html --
{{ define "content" }}<h1>{{ upper .Title }}</h1>{{ end }}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Templates *templates.Set
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	h.Templates.Render(w, "home", map[string]string{"Title": "hi"})
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/templates"

	"app/shared"
	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	webTemplates, err := templates.Load(web.Templates, "templates", templates.FuncMap{
		"humanizeAge": web.HumanizeAge,
		"reverse":     shared.Reverse,
		"upper":       web.UpperCase,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	webHandlers := &web.Handlers{
		Templates: webTemplates,
	}

	r := router.New()

	// Register
	r.Method("GET", "/", webHandlers.Home)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
